description: A grouped disclosure surface that folds and unfolds related content while preserving hierarchy and origin.

a11y.reducedMotion: Replace folding geometry with an immediate disclosure and a persistent state marker.
a11y.keyboardContract: A native button controls the region and exposes aria-expanded and aria-controls.
a11y.nonVisualEquivalent: The controlled region has a programmatic name and its visibility follows the control state.
